_meta.source: docs/design/heist-content.md §GEAR + playtest wave 2 (thematic names, visible sell rule)

units.magnitude: stat points added to the player's lane rating
units.kind: statBoost stacks; powerUp is idempotent (one per lane per player)
units.name: thematic heist name shown on share-out cards and the gear panel
units.blurb: one-line flavour read out by the GM

items.name: Burner Laptop
items.blurb: Pre-loaded exploits, zero serial numbers, smells faintly of solder.

items.name: Grippy Gloves
items.blurb: Climber's chalk included. The ledge stops being a problem.

items.name: Tailored Suit
items.blurb: Nobody questions a person whose trousers fit this well.

items.name: Magnetic Soles
items.blurb: Walk the air vents like a corridor. Squeak-free, guaranteed.

items.name: Zero-Day Cache
items.blurb: A USB stick worth more than the van. Every lock thinks you're staff.

items.name: Stunt Double's Rig
items.blurb: Harness, grip tape, and the confidence of someone who's done the fall twice.

items.name: The Cover Story
items.blurb: Business cards, a LinkedIn, and two people who'll vouch. You ARE the inspector.

items.name: Ghost Protocol
items.blurb: Thermal-dampened, motion-mapped, and rude to cameras. You're a rumour now.

items.name: Hacker's Rig
items.blurb: One shouted play per job — the Tech ace move, whenever you call it.

items.name: Iron Grip
items.blurb: One shouted play per job — the Physical ace move, whenever you call it.

items.name: The Favor
items.blurb: One shouted play per job — the Charm ace move, whenever you call it.

items.name: Ghost Kit
items.blurb: One shouted play per job — the Stealth ace move, whenever you call it.
